summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM Public VIN Search functionality. All core features working correctly including VIN search, lead form, and SEO-friendly routes.
passed_tests: Public VIN Search page loads at /vin-check
VIN search with valid 17-char VIN returns proper results
VIN search shows 'not found' state properly
Lead form appears when clicking 'Запитати про авто'
Lead form submission creates lead in database
Lead contains VIN and customer info
Public VIN API endpoints work: GET /api/public/vin/search?vin=XXX
Public VIN API endpoints work: GET /api/public/vin/:vin
Public VIN API endpoints work: POST /api/public/vin/lead
Lead form validation works for invalid data
Success message displays after lead submission
